name: Military Moving Expense Deduction

eligibility.description: Limited to active duty Armed Forces members moving due to a permanent change of station; most other taxpayers are suspended through 2025 (and 2026 per recent amendment text).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Active duty members of the Armed Forces can deduct moving expenses and exclude reimbursements from income when moving pursuant to a military order.
